name: Herbed Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients into a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Process until the bread is chopped into crumbs.
3. If your recipe calls for toasted bread crumbs:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spread the bread crumbs evenly on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for 3 to 5 minutes, then stir the crumbs and bake until light brown and crisp, about 2 to 3 minutes.
Makes about 2 cups.
These can be made ahead and stored in a plastic bag in the freezer.
